mono.usage: Strictly for FNSKU barcodes, IDs, tracking numbers, and numeric data in tables. Use text-sm or text-xs.

spacing_and_layout.general: B2B dense grid with optical alignment. Use generous padding (p-6 or p-8) inside major containers to prevent text collision.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid (Dense). Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap: gap-6. Every pixel utilized. h-full on children.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Subtle roundness. Use rounded-md (6px) globally for inputs, cards, and buttons to keep it crisp, technical, and modern.

cards.style: Flat solid surfaces. 1px border (border-slate-200), shadow-sm. No heavy shadows. High contrast text.
cards.kpi: Large primary metric (text-3xl font-black Chivo), small tracking label above it (text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-500).

buttons.primary: bg-[#1F9FB3] text-white hover:bg-[#1A899A] rounded-md transition-all px-4 py-2 font-medium focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1F9FB3]/50 focus:outline-none
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md transition-all px-4 py-2 font-medium

badges.style: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-[11px] font-bold tracking-wide uppercase border
badges.variants: Colors based on status palette. Background is 10% opacity of the color, text is the pure color, border is 20% opacity of the color.

tables.style: Grid Borders style. border-collapse. border-b border-slate-200 on rows. Hover state on rows: bg-slate-50. Compact density (py-2 px-4 cells) for fast scanning.

sidebar.style: Dark mode exclusive. bg-zinc-950 border-r border-zinc-900. Text is zinc-400, hover is text-white bg-zinc-900/50. Active state uses border-l-2 border-[#1F9FB3] text-white.
sidebar.logo_container: h-24 flex flex-col items-start justify-center px-6 border-b border-zinc-900/50. Massive negative space to let the logo breathe.

client_top_nav.style: Crystal Glassmorphism. backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200/50 shadow-sm. Sticky top-0 z-50. Client logo visible but constrained to max-h-10.

logo.description: Brand Logo (Teal/cyan lemon-slice + arrow + ai wordmark). Transparent background. Pops best on the dark Zinc-950 sidebar background and the dark login hero.

login_background.description: Premium modern warehouse background for login split screen. MUST use an overlay of bg-zinc-950/85 to ensure the teal logo and typography pop massively without the image overwhelming the layout.

animations.micro_interactions: Hover states on all interactive elements. Buttons lift slightly (-translate-y-0.5) with 'transition-transform duration-200'. Table rows use subtle bg color transition.
animations.page_transitions: If using framer-motion, implement a staggered fade-up for dashboard KPI cards and table list items (0.05s stagger, y: 10 to 0).

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based).
Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for sharp, professional dashboard iconography. (yarn add @phosphor-icons/react)

Implement the login page as a 50/50 split (md:grid-cols-2). Left side: the dark warehouse image with heavy zinc-950/85 overlay, placing the massive brand logo vertically and horizontally centered with a poetic, premium tagline. Right side: clean, high-contrast white form.
For the Admin Sidebar, strictly use the dark theme (bg-zinc-950) so the transparent teal logo pops. Do not invert the logo, the #1F9FB3 color shines beautifully against near-black.
Tables must have sticky headers and handle horizontal scrolling gracefully. Do not use generic Shadcn cards everywhere; go cardless and rectangular for dense table views.
Invoice PDF generation and Barcode generation should use the exact same typography (Chivo/JetBrains Mono).
Keep Shadcn components but override borders to rounded-md and use the custom #1F9FB3 ring color for focus states.
For the Client area top-nav, use backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 to achieve the 'Crystal Glass' effect, adding a subtle shadow-sm.
Ensure the progress steppers for 'Preparazioni' are highly visible, using the status colors defined to show the exact lifecycle stage.
